## Meeting Purpose

[Review potential partnership between GrowthX and Netwrix for content marketing and SEO optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/FAMoJz92TBCaLNFSBAaAMxfxdaJyz86W?tab=summary&timestamp=36.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Netwrix is launching a new website and brand next week, consolidating domains and improving site structure](https://fathom.video/share/FAMoJz92TBCaLNFSBAaAMxfxdaJyz86W?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)
  - [Netwrix needs help scaling high-quality, technical content creation for decision-maker personas while avoiding vanity metrics](https://fathom.video/share/FAMoJz92TBCaLNFSBAaAMxfxdaJyz86W?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
  - [GrowthX offers AI-powered content workflows and deep persona research to create targeted, converting content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/FAMoJz92TBCaLNFSBAaAMxfxdaJyz86W?tab=summary&timestamp=942.0)
  - [Both parties need to evaluate if there's a strong mutual fit and value proposition for a partnership](https://fathom.video/share/FAMoJz92TBCaLNFSBAaAMxfxdaJyz86W?tab=summary&timestamp=49.0)

## Topics

### Netwrix's Current Content Marketing Situation

  - [Inherited declining traffic (\~1.5M visitors lost in previous year)](https://fathom.video/share/FAMoJz92TBCaLNFSBAaAMxfxdaJyz86W?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
  - [Focused on conversion optimization for core website pages](https://fathom.video/share/FAMoJz92TBCaLNFSBAaAMxfxdaJyz86W?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
  - [Pivoted to marketing 6 core solution areas instead of 18 products](https://fathom.video/share/FAMoJz92TBCaLNFSBAaAMxfxdaJyz86W?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [Seeing traffic growth for product/solution pages and blog](https://fathom.video/share/FAMoJz92TBCaLNFSBAaAMxfxdaJyz86W?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
  - [Small, lean content marketing team with recent staff transitions](https://fathom.video/share/FAMoJz92TBCaLNFSBAaAMxfxdaJyz86W?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)

### Content Creation Challenges

  - [Need for technical, persona-specific content that goes beyond surface-level](https://fathom.video/share/FAMoJz92TBCaLNFSBAaAMxfxdaJyz86W?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
  - [Balancing top-of-funnel vs. middle/bottom-funnel content](https://fathom.video/share/FAMoJz92TBCaLNFSBAaAMxfxdaJyz86W?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
  - [Avoiding vanity metrics (e.g., high traffic volume that doesn't convert)](https://fathom.video/share/FAMoJz92TBCaLNFSBAaAMxfxdaJyz86W?tab=summary&timestamp=1324.0)
  - [Integrating product marketing insights into content workflows](https://fathom.video/share/FAMoJz92TBCaLNFSBAaAMxfxdaJyz86W?tab=summary&timestamp=503.0)
  - [Scaling content creation with limited internal resources](https://fathom.video/share/FAMoJz92TBCaLNFSBAaAMxfxdaJyz86W?tab=summary&timestamp=481.0)

### GrowthX's AI-Powered Content Approach

  - [Proprietary workflow-as-code engine for research and content creation](https://fathom.video/share/FAMoJz92TBCaLNFSBAaAMxfxdaJyz86W?tab=summary&timestamp=942.0)
  - [Deep persona research and artifact creation](https://fathom.video/share/FAMoJz92TBCaLNFSBAaAMxfxdaJyz86W?tab=summary&timestamp=1445.0)
  - [Iterative improvement of content quality through AI evaluations](https://fathom.video/share/FAMoJz92TBCaLNFSBAaAMxfxdaJyz86W?tab=summary&timestamp=1013.0)
  - [Integration of brand guidelines and writing style](https://fathom.video/share/FAMoJz92TBCaLNFSBAaAMxfxdaJyz86W?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)
  - [Ability to create technical content at scale (e.g., code snippets, infographics)](https://fathom.video/share/FAMoJz92TBCaLNFSBAaAMxfxdaJyz86W?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)

### Potential Partnership Considerations

  - [GrowthX could potentially replace Netwrix's current SEO agency](https://fathom.video/share/FAMoJz92TBCaLNFSBAaAMxfxdaJyz86W?tab=summary&timestamp=1773.0)
  - [Need to ensure focus on right audience personas and converting traffic](https://fathom.video/share/FAMoJz92TBCaLNFSBAaAMxfxdaJyz86W?tab=summary&timestamp=1235.0)
  - [Importance of tight integration and mutual value recognition](https://fathom.video/share/FAMoJz92TBCaLNFSBAaAMxfxdaJyz86W?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [GrowthX's track record with other security/tech companies (e.g., Abnormal Security, SentinelOne)](https://fathom.video/share/FAMoJz92TBCaLNFSBAaAMxfxdaJyz86W?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Netwrix team to internally discuss potential fit and value of partnership](https://fathom.video/share/FAMoJz92TBCaLNFSBAaAMxfxdaJyz86W?tab=summary&timestamp=1725.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide follow-up information on:](https://fathom.video/share/FAMoJz92TBCaLNFSBAaAMxfxdaJyz86W?tab=summary&timestamp=1725.0)
      - [Characteristics of successful client partnerships](https://fathom.video/share/FAMoJz92TBCaLNFSBAaAMxfxdaJyz86W?tab=summary&timestamp=1725.0)
      - [Detailed next steps for potential engagement](https://fathom.video/share/FAMoJz92TBCaLNFSBAaAMxfxdaJyz86W?tab=summary&timestamp=1725.0)
  - [Both parties to evaluate mutual fit and decide on moving forward](https://fathom.video/share/FAMoJz92TBCaLNFSBAaAMxfxdaJyz86W?tab=summary&timestamp=1877.0)
